description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the coalzombik/mono-gtk2:5.14.0.177 Docker image with a before_script that runs nuget restore -NonInteractive. Define a single build stage with two jobs: debug and release. The debug job runs msbuild /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=x86 /p:OutputPath=./CDAR-Debug/ CDAR.sln then ./mpo -e ./CDAR-Debug/locale, stores the CDAR-Debug/* directory as artifacts, and is excluded from the master branch and tag pipelines. The release job runs msbuild /p:Configuration=Release /p:Platform=x86 /p:OutputPath=./CDAR/ CDAR.sln then ./mpo -e ./CDAR/locale/, stores the CDAR/* directory as artifacts, and only runs on the master branch or when a tag is created.
